items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Though I've seen this in the record, it still amazes me to see this in reality.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: I'm kind of shocked, really.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Solving progress: 30%. There should be another 2 puzzles. Thank you.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: The difficulty of it... I wonder what got into the designer's mind.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: It was simply designed to embarrass! You handled it perfectly, though.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: The progress reached 60%! We should be finishing this soon.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: You solved such a difficult puzzle in such a short time?!

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: That was awe-inspiring...

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: The access is open, I should get going.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Thank you. It would be a lie if I say I'm not afraid to go down this abandoned pit.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: It's just... there might be unknown dangers in here and I don't want to drag you in...

options.text: Got to help you until the end.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Thank you! It's just... there might be unknown dangers in here and I don't want to drag you in...

options.text: Got to help you until the end.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Thank... thank you so much. It's so very kind of you...

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Thank... thank you so much. It's so very kind of you...

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: If you were to be held accountable, I will make sure the blame is all on me.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Yes. Going down the abandoned pit without proper procedures is a punishable conduct. It could result in as serious as dismissal.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Though you're not one of us, and you shouldn't be implicated, we can't know for sure, right?

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: After all it's my matter. I can't get you in trouble.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Anyway, I should give more thoughts about how to protect down in the pit...

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: ... Because the blame is something we talk about when we get out!

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Mi'zhi, Mi'zhi!

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: We have to take him to the infirmary now. I can't take him on my own. Give me a hand.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Phew... we're finally here.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Thank you so much for today. I just don't know how I could have handled this without you.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: It's been a long day. You should take some rest. I'll send you the reward.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: And I myself will wait here for Mi'zhi to wake up.

items.speaker: Unknown Contact
items.text: Hello, is this {PlayerName}?

items.speaker: Unknown Contact
items.text: Hello, I'm Qingshu, an engineer on Magnetic Cube puzzles.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Have you seen an unfathomable engineer recently?

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Yes yes. Mi'zhi indeed.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: He was due this morning, but I didn't meet him. And I went to the field only to find the puzzles cracked, and he was neither there.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: I ran down the challenge record of the puzzle and found your ID, so I called to ask. Hope I didn't bother you.

options.text: He talked about entering the pit.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: What?! Can you be so kind as to come here yourself?

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: I'm sorry for this sudden request, but I have no other choices.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Thank you so much! You will have your proper compensation. I promise.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: Since it's such an emergency. I don't think I can expalin everything quite clearly over the call. Let's meet and talk.

items.speaker: Qingshu
items.text: You will have your proper compensation. I promise.
